_comment: Sprint 3 Phase A2 (S72): three server entries (echo + perplexity + Chrome_DevTools_MCP). Each spawns its own proxy instance with the upstream key as argv[2]. Tool prefix surfaces as mcp__<key>__<tool> — matching executor.ts --allowedTools allowlist for perplexity + Chrome_DevTools_MCP at agent/executor.ts:858-874.
_single_host_note: G-2 carry-forward (S71): absolute paths Windows-specific to this developer host. Phase B+ TODO for runtime regeneration if Linux-port. Worker daemon never deploys; OK.
_codex_c1_note: C-1 carry-forward (S71): absolute file:// URL to tsx loader for cwd-independence. Real executor at agent/executor.ts:888 spawns claude with cwd=per-job workDir (under Projects/<slug>/) which lacks tsx in its node_modules chain.
_a2_note: Tool prefix per Gemini G-1 (S71): perplexity key surfaces tools as mcp__perplexity__perplexity_research etc.; Chrome_DevTools_MCP key surfaces as mcp__Chrome_DevTools_MCP__list_pages etc. KEY NAMES MUST MATCH allowlist exactly (case-sensitive).
